title: TransactionStream
description: Normalized, categorized, de-duplicated canonical transactions linked to MerchantGraph nodes (FR-CORE-002). Provided by Module 0 to all modules. Amounts are integer minor units (MoneyCents). Each transaction carries a FreshnessStamp; pending transactions and dedup decisions are explicit so consumers never double-count.

cursor.description: Opaque pagination/sync cursor for incremental reads; ordering is by booked_at then transaction_id.

transaction_id.description: Stable canonical FinOS id surviving dedup merges.

amount.description: Transaction amount in integer cents (absolute magnitude; sign carried by direction).

status.description: pending amounts may change; consumers MUST treat pending as provisional and not as a settled money input for runway.

description_raw.description: Raw provider descriptor (used for normalization; redacted from debug logs).

merchant_id.description: Resolved MerchantGraph node id; null when normalization could not confidently resolve a merchant.

category.description: Canonical category key (bilingual labels resolved at the edge via @finos/format).

category_source.description: Provenance of the category for explainability; user_override always wins.

cad_amount.description: Foreign transactions converted to CAD via a timestamped FX rate (arbitrary precision, half-up at the final cent). Equals amount for CAD transactions.

fx_rate.description: Decimal-string FX rate used for cad_amount; null for CAD. Stale FX flags cad_amount (Constitution VIII).

dedup_state.description: merged_duplicate rows are suppressed from sums; suspected_duplicate is surfaced for confirmation and excluded from money math until resolved (FR-CORE-002, duplicate-transaction edge case).

merged_into_transaction_id.description: For merged_duplicate: the surviving merged_primary id.

is_recurring.description: Heuristic recurrence flag powering Bills/Subscriptions consumers.
